issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Batch-summarize support tickets via local LM Studio
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses AsyncOpenAI with base_url='http://localhost:1234/v1', a process_batch function with asyncio.Semaphore set to max_concurrent=1-2 (matching the skill's note that LM Studio handles one request at a time), and temperature 0.2 with the deterministic settings called out in guidelines; baseline ignores the concurrency-of-1 constraint or fails to use the OpenAI-compatible base_url pattern.

scenarios.name: Build specialized local classifier and extractor subagents
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines reusable LocalSubagent class with per-task system_prompt and temperature=0.0 for classification/extraction tasks as the skill prescribes, points the OpenAI client at localhost:1234/v1 with api_key='lm-studio', and uses 8B-class quantized models per guidelines; baseline doesn't apply the temperature=0 determinism rule or class abstraction.
